name: tokenforge
description: TokenForge — Full-stack LLM token optimization engine. Compresses code, command output, conversation, JSON, and MCP schemas with AST-aware intelligence.

tools.name: tokenforge_stats
tools.description: Show compression statistics for the current or specified session. Returns total tokens processed, tokens saved, savings percentage, and per-content-type breakdown.

tools.name: tokenforge_expand
tools.description: Retrieve the full original content by its blake3 hash. Use this when compressed output has lost information you need — the original is stored losslessly in SQLite with zstd compression.

hash.description: Blake3 hash of the original content

tools.name: tokenforge_budget
tools.description: View or set per-category token budgets. Categories: conversation, tool_output, code_context, mcp_schema. Budgets auto-adjust based on session type.

tools.name: tokenforge_expand_tool
tools.description: Retrieve the full MCP tool schema by tool name. When MCP schemas are compressed to save tokens, use this to get the complete input_schema for a specific tool on demand.

tool_name.description: Name of the MCP tool to expand
